options.c: either low or high memory (depending on the location of interrupt vector)

options.a: each process is contained in a single contiguous section of memory
options.b: all processes are contained in a single contiguous section of memory

options.a: providing more address space to processes

question: With relocation and limit registers, each logical address must be _______ the limit register.

options.d: every address generated by the CPU is being checked against the relocation and limit registers
